text:

Author: jhale

Log:
  Update to 1.54.1
  Unbreak fetch (project moved to Github)
  Clean up and fix some broken dependencies
  Regenerate patches with 'make makepatch'
  Use standard options descriptions when possible

  PR:		213692 (based on)

  Approved by:	maintainer timeout
  MFH:		2017Q1 (blanket)
